tests.name: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
tests.description: Evaluates overall health and detects anemia, infection, and leukemia.

tests.name: Vitamin D (25-Hydroxy)
tests.home_notes: Drink plenty of water before collection.
tests.description: Measures Vitamin D concentration to identify bone and metabolism deficiencies.

tests.name: Thyroid Profile (T3, T4, TSH)
tests.home_notes: Collect early morning before taking thyroid medications.
tests.description: Assesses thyroid gland function to evaluate metabolic speed and energy.

tests.name: Liver Function Test (LFT)
tests.home_notes: Avoid alcohol 24 hours prior to collection.
tests.description: Measures proteins, enzymes, and bilirubin to screen for liver disorders.

tests.name: Digital ECG (Electrocardiogram)
tests.preparation: Avoid caffeine or nicotine 2 hours prior to the test.
tests.home_notes: Requires a quiet, flat resting space.
tests.description: Records the electrical signals in your heart to check for different heart conditions.

tests.name: Ultrasound Abdomen & Pelvis (USG)
tests.preparation: Full bladder required. Drink 4-5 glasses of water 1 hour before.
tests.home_notes: Only available for walk-in lab visits.
tests.description: Uses sound waves to evaluate abdominal organs like liver, kidneys, gallbladder, spleen, and pelvis.

packages.name: Comprehensive Health Package
packages.description: Full body panel containing Complete Blood Count, Liver Function Test, and Thyroid Profile at a bundle discount.

packages.name: Basic Health Checkup
packages.description: Essential screening package evaluating overall health, blood sugar, lipid levels, thyroid, liver, and kidney function.

packages.name: Diabetes Profile
packages.description: Comprehensive panel for monitoring and diagnosing blood sugar levels, long-term glycemic control, and secondary diabetic implications on kidneys and lipids.

packages.name: Thyroid Profile
packages.description: Evaluates thyroid gland activity. Includes free and total thyroid hormones to screen for hyperthyroidism and hypothyroidism.

packages.name: Heart Health Package
packages.description: Cardiovascular screening package including lipid analysis, cardiac inflammatory marker (CRP), ECG, glucose, and metabolic status.

packages.name: Women's Health Package
packages.description: Specifically designed checkup for women, focusing on bone health, anemia, vitamins, thyroid function, and diabetic screening.

packages.name: Senior Citizen Health Package
packages.description: Full body geriatric screening panel covering critical parameters for elder care including cardiac, kidney, liver, vitamins, and metabolic functions.
